name: Jab Snap Drill
description: Throw fast single jabs with full extension and instant recovery to guard.
coach_tip: Snap the jab back faster than you throw it.
goal: Develop a fast, sharp lead hand

name: 1-2 Precision Drill
description: Practice clean jab-cross combinations while staying balanced.
coach_tip: Stay relaxed and rotate through the hips.

name: Hook Rotation Drill
description: Throw lead hooks focusing on pivot, hip rotation, and balance.
coach_tip: Power starts from the feet, not the arms.
goal: Generate stronger hooks with proper mechanics

name: Slip Line Drill
description: Slip left and right under an imaginary punch line while staying balanced.
coach_tip: Move your head, not your entire body.
goal: Improve defensive rhythm and head movement

name: Slip & Counter Drill
description: Slip incoming punches and immediately fire back with counters.
coach_tip: Defend and attack in one motion.
goal: Build reaction speed and counter timing

name: Punch Volume Intervals
description: Throw nonstop punches for 30 seconds followed by 30 seconds rest.
coach_tip: Stay loose even at high pace.

name: Continuous Shadowboxing
description: Keep moving and punching continuously without stopping.
coach_tip: Flow smoothly between offense and defense.

name: Clap Pushups
description: Explode off the floor and clap between reps.
